issues.where_in_reference_it_is_missing: The reference text gives NO AP-exam percentage weight for Unit 8 anywhere. The header is simply 'Unit 8 — Community Ecology (M13)' with no numeric exam weight.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the '(10–15% of AP exam)' parenthetical, or substantiate it from a College Board CED source outside this reference before asserting it as fact.

issues.unsupported_claim: Unit 8 (Ecology) is 10–15% of the AP exam.
issues.where_in_reference_it_is_missing: No exam-weight percentage appears anywhere in the reference text.
issues.suggested_fix: Delete the percentage claim from the content_hint and narration_seed, or cite the CED separately.

issues.unsupported_claim: Welcome to AP Biology, Module Thirteen ... which is ten to fifteen percent of your exam.
issues.where_in_reference_it_is_missing: Same as above — the 'ten to fifteen percent' figure is not in the reference text.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the spoken percentage figure from the narration.

issues.unsupported_claim: ~10-year cycles repeating for over a century. (narration: 'roughly ten-year cycles repeating for over a century.')
issues.where_in_reference_it_is_missing: The reference supports '~10-year cycles' and 'Hudson's Bay fur records,' but says NOTHING about the duration 'for over a century' / 'over a century.' That timespan is an added numeric claim.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop 'repeating for over a century' / 'for over a century'; keep only 'show ~10-year cycles.'

issues.unsupported_claim: within a season / within a season ... the diverse community collapsed (also in 02_hook: 'within a season')
issues.where_in_reference_it_is_missing: The reference states Paine's sea-star removal led to mussel monoculture and biodiversity collapse, but gives NO timeframe ('within a season').
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the 'within a season' timing detail, or replace with a non-numeric phrasing the reference supports (e.g., 'the community collapsed into a mussel monoculture').

issues.unsupported_claim: within a season, the diverse community collapsed into a wall of mussels
issues.where_in_reference_it_is_missing: Reference gives the outcome (mussel monoculture, biodiversity collapse) but no time-to-collapse.
issues.suggested_fix: Cut 'within a season'; the rest of the hook is supported.

overall_assessment: Species names, Latin binomial (Pisaster ochraceus), researcher names (Robert Paine, Robert MacArthur, Gause), all six interactions with correct signs and examples, Lotka-Volterra, lynx/hare with Hudson's Bay fur records, the ~10-year cycle, mimicry types, the viceroy/monarch reconsideration caveat, succession details, and diversity components all match the reference faithfully. The only genuine fabrications relative to the reference are the recurring '10–15% of AP exam' weight (not in the reference at all — critical) and two minor added numeric/time embellishments ('for over a century', 'within a season'). No invented species, names, or binomials were found.
